rationale: Educ. Code §48.254 concerns state aid for Chapter 313 economic development tax credits, unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: For each school year, a school district, including a school district that is otherwise ineligible for state aid under this chapter, is entitled to state aid in an amount equal to the amount of all tax credits credited against ad valorem taxes of the district in that year under former Subchapter D, Chapter 313, Tax Code.
_note: Rule text addresses Chapter 313 tax credits, not homestead exemptions; no interaction with proposed change.
